title: Spatially resolved ex vivo drug response profiling in SMARCB1-deficient sinonasal carcinoma.
snippet: SMARCB1-deficient sinonasal carcinoma (SDSC) is a rare, highly aggressive malignancy with limited therapeutic options and no established preclinical models. Here, single-nucleus RNA sequencing (snRNAseq), spatial transcriptomics, and ex vivo patient-derived tissue slice culture (TSC) were combined to resolve intratumoral heterogeneity, niche organization, a...
